reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, playeros quizás demoran porque aceptan pago con tarjetas, serviclub y descuento en carga con descuento de puntos. Personal sumamente amables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The attendants might be a little slow because they accept card payments, Serviclub offers, and there's a discount on fuel purchases with points. The staff is extremely friendly.

reviews.comment:
Yo soy socio hace muchos años, lo utilizo para renovar el registro y voy a la cede en Libertador.  Siempre fui bien atendido por el personal del área,  Solo tengo una queja contra un médico nuevo que no respeta aun colega y que es demasiado pedante,  Pero bueno siempre uno se cruza con un galeno que no sabe mas que de papeles.

(Translated by Google)
I've been a member for many years, I use it to renew my registration, and I go to the branch on Libertador Avenue. I've always been well taken care of by the staff. I only have one complaint against a new doctor who doesn't respect a colleague and is overly pedantic. But, well, you always run into a doctor who knows nothing but paperwork.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZdV82bUVBEAE
